# archive/apps-semantos-monolith/test/voice/voice_session_service_test.dart

```dart
// D-O5m.followup-3 Phase 1 — Cross-language voice-session parity test.
//
// This test loads the fixture generated by the TS side
// (`runtime/intent/scripts/gen-voice-fixture.ts` produces it; the TS
// test `runtime/intent/src/voice/__tests__/cross-lang-fixture.test.ts`
// asserts it matches the canonical encoders) and asserts the Dart
// `voice_session_service.dart` produces byte-identical output.
//
// Without this parity proof, Dart-signed transcripts could be rejected
// by the brain's verifier (or, worse, accepted while encoding the
// wrong fields). Same load-bearing pattern as
// `cell_signer_test.dart`'s cell-signing-fixture.json check.

import 'dart:convert';
import 'dart:io';
import 'dart:typed_data';

import 'package:test/test.dart';

import 'package:semantos/src/voice/voice_session_service.dart';

Uint8List _hexToBytes(String hex) {
  final out = Uint8List(hex.length ~/ 2);
  for (var i = 0; i < out.length; i++) {
    out[i] = int.parse(hex.substring(i * 2, i * 2 + 2), radix: 16);
  }
  return out;
}

String _bytesToHex(List<int> bytes) {
  final sb = StringBuffer();
  for (final b in bytes) {
    sb.write((b & 0xff).toRadixString(16).padLeft(2, '0'));
  }
  return sb.toString();
}

void main() {
  group('voice_session_service cross-language fixture parity', () {
    late Map<String, dynamic> fixture;

    setUpAll(() {
      final f = File('test/fixtures/voice-session-fixture.json');
      if (!f.existsSync()) {
        throw StateError(
            'Fixture missing: ${f.absolute.path}. Run `bun run scripts/gen-voice-fixture.ts` from runtime/intent/.');
      }
      fixture = json.decode(f.readAsStringSync()) as Map<String, dynamic>;
    });

    test('voiceSessionPreimage matches the TS encoder byte-for-byte', () {
      final pre = voiceSessionPreimage(
        fixture['certId'] as String,
        fixture['startedAtMs'] as int,
      );
      expect(_bytesToHex(pre), equals(fixture['voiceSessionPreimageHex']),
          reason:
              'Dart voiceSessionPreimage must produce byte-identical output to TS — '
              'cert binding depends on it.');
      expect(pre.length, equals(40));
    });

    test('deriveVoiceSessionId matches the TS encoder', () {
      final sid = deriveVoiceSessionId(
        fixture['certId'] as String,
        fixture['startedAtMs'] as int,
      );
      expect(sid, equals(fixture['sessionId']));
    });

    test(
        'canonicalTranscriptPreimage matches the TS encoder byte-for-byte',
        () {
      final pre = canonicalTranscriptPreimage(
        sessionId: fixture['sessionId'] as String,
        certId: fixture['certId'] as String,
        sequence: fixture['sequence'] as int,
        text: fixture['text'] as String,
        timestampMs: fixture['timestamp'] as int,
      );
      expect(_bytesToHex(pre),
          equals(fixture['canonicalTranscriptPreimageHex']),
          reason:
              'Dart canonicalTranscriptPreimage must produce byte-identical '
              'output to TS — transcript signatures depend on this preimage.');
      expect(utf8.decode(pre),
          equals(fixture['canonicalTranscriptPreimageUtf8']));
    });

    test('deriveTranscriptId matches the TS encoder', () {
      final tid = deriveTranscriptId(
        fixture['sessionId'] as String,
        fixture['sequence'] as int,
      );
      expect(tid, equals(fixture['transcriptId']));
    });
  });

  group('addTranscript / verifyTranscript happy path', () {
    test('a Dart-signed transcript verifies against the recovered pubkey', () {
      final priv = _hexToBytes(
          '5ad0e1ff96b4ef3df1ad34e5b97c4c1d8a5fe24ed18793e89d96d4d2e1abf001');
      // Same pub from the cell-signing fixture.
      final pub = _hexToBytes(
          '03311ca3e2bacb244e50339b61d4652bba16d55fccf2fe33af73827b3745b17098');
      final certId =
          'aa11bb22cc33dd44ee55ff667788990011223344556677889900aabbccddeeff';
      final session = VoiceSession(
        id: deriveVoiceSessionId(certId, 1700000000000),
        certId: certId,
        subjectPublicKey: _bytesToHex(pub),
        startedAtMs: 1700000000000,
      );
      final signer = makeCellSignerVoiceSigner(
        devicePrivBytes: priv,
        certId: certId,
      );
      final t = addTranscript(
        session: session,
        text: 'job 12345 is invoiced',
        signer: signer,
        sequence: 0,
        nowMs: 1700000001500,
      );
      expect(verifyTranscript(t, pub), isTrue);
      expect(transcriptBelongsToSession(t, session), isTrue);
      expect(t.signature.bytes.length, equals(64));
    });

    test('addTranscript rejects when signer keyId mismatches session certId',
        () {
      final priv = _hexToBytes(
          '5ad0e1ff96b4ef3df1ad34e5b97c4c1d8a5fe24ed18793e89d96d4d2e1abf001');
      final certId = 'a' * 64;
      final wrongCertId = 'b' * 64;
      final session = VoiceSession(
        id: deriveVoiceSessionId(certId, 1700000000000),
        certId: certId,
        subjectPublicKey: '02' + 'b' * 64,
        startedAtMs: 1700000000000,
      );
      final signer = makeCellSignerVoiceSigner(
        devicePrivBytes: priv,
        certId: wrongCertId,
      );
      expect(
        () => addTranscript(session: session, text: 'hi', signer: signer),
        throwsA(isA<VoiceContractError>()),
      );
    });

    test('addTranscript rejects negative sequence', () {
      final priv = _hexToBytes(
          '5ad0e1ff96b4ef3df1ad34e5b97c4c1d8a5fe24ed18793e89d96d4d2e1abf001');
      final certId = 'a' * 64;
      final session = VoiceSession(
        id: deriveVoiceSessionId(certId, 1700000000000),
        certId: certId,
        subjectPublicKey: '02' + 'b' * 64,
        startedAtMs: 1700000000000,
      );
      final signer = makeCellSignerVoiceSigner(
          devicePrivBytes: priv, certId: certId);
      expect(
        () => addTranscript(
            session: session, text: 'hi', signer: signer, sequence: -1),
        throwsA(isA<VoiceContractError>()),
      );
    });

    test('verifyTranscript rejects keyId/certId mismatch (structural check)',
        () {
      final priv = _hexToBytes(
          '5ad0e1ff96b4ef3df1ad34e5b97c4c1d8a5fe24ed18793e89d96d4d2e1abf001');
      final pub = _hexToBytes(
          '03311ca3e2bacb244e50339b61d4652bba16d55fccf2fe33af73827b3745b17098');
      final certId = 'a' * 64;
      final session = VoiceSession(
        id: deriveVoiceSessionId(certId, 1700000000000),
        certId: certId,
        subjectPublicKey: _bytesToHex(pub),
        startedAtMs: 1700000000000,
      );
      final signer =
          makeCellSignerVoiceSigner(devicePrivBytes: priv, certId: certId);
      final t = addTranscript(
          session: session, text: 'hi', signer: signer, sequence: 0);
      // Tamper with the signature keyId — should fail structural check.
      final tampered = Transcript(
        id: t.id,
        sessionId: t.sessionId,
        certId: t.certId,
        sequence: t.sequence,
        text: t.text,
        timestampMs: t.timestampMs,
        signature: VoiceSignature(
          bytes: t.signature.bytes,
          algorithm: t.signature.algorithm,
          keyId: 'b' * 64,
        ),
      );
      expect(verifyTranscript(tampered, pub), isFalse);
    });
  });
}

```
